zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted於1345年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯時，他的父親John Poley25歲，母親Agnes Whetley25歲。他於1384年與Anne DeBadwell在英國英格蘭賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1414年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾享年69歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾可迪可特。

nameMeanings.name: Poley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Nord): from a variant of Polet, a vernacular pet form of the personal name Paul . This surname is very rare in France.
East German: habitational name from a place so named near Frankfurt on the Oder.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted was born in 1345, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Poley, was 25 and his mother, Agnes Whetley, was 25. He married Anne DeBadwell in 1384, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1414, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Codicote, Hertfordshire, England.

Il a épousé Anne DeBadwell en 1384, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1414, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Codicote, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted(이)가 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Poley(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Whetley(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 Anne DeBadwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 코딕트에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Anne DeBadwell em 1384, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Poley Lord of Boxted родился в 1345 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Poley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Whetley, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne DeBadwell в 1384 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1414 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности кодикот, хиртфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Anne DeBadwell en 1384, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1414, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Codicote, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
